name: ai-react-markdown
desc: A React component library for rendering AI-generated markdown — LLM streaming, LaTeX math, Mermaid diagrams, GFM, syntax highlighting, CJK-friendly typography,…
descFull: A React component library for rendering AI-generated markdown — LLM streaming, LaTeX math, Mermaid diagrams, GFM, syntax highlighting, CJK-friendly typography, and cross-chunk reference coordination.
